_comment: Modash-driver entry for the shared C:\hn-control\manifest.json. Chat 1's manifest builder reads this file (or this content) and merges it into the master manifest.json on hn-winpc. Keep this file in sync with reality — when behavior changes, update here too.
name: modash-driver
purpose: Autonomous Modash discovery — pre-logged Chromium profiles run searches under rotated trial accounts, push results into HN influencer pipeline.
processes: Playwright-managed Chromium (only when a job is active — usually <60s/run, headless)
do_not_disturb: C:\hn-control\modash-driver\  (all subdirs, especially profiles/profile-N which holds session cookies)
i_promise_not_to_touch: Any Scheduled Task other than HN-Modash-Poller
System-wide Stop-Process -Name chrome (or any broad chrome-killing command)

needed_for: running install.ps1 (to prevent concurrent npm install / Scheduled Task race)
running setup-modash-profile.ps1 -ProfileNum N (per-profile-num lock to prevent concurrent re-login)

secrets_needed: CRON_TOKEN (User env var, set by install.ps1)
MODASH_PROFILES_DIR (User env var, defaults to C:\hn-control\modash-driver\profiles)
human_touchpoints: One-time: setup-modash-profile.ps1 per Modash account (owner types Modash password into Chrome)
Recurring: re-run setup when cookies expire (~30 days, signaled via API status=broken)
